_comment: Canonical UserSettings document shape. g8ed is the authority — it creates and updates this document in the settings collection. g8ee reads it at request time via UserSettingsDocument.model_validate(). Settings are grouped into nested sub-objects (llm, search, eval_judge) that map directly to g8ee Pydantic models.
_consumers: g8ee (Python — reads at request time to build per-user G8eeUserSettings)

user_settings._description: Per-user settings document. Top-level fields include user_id and timestamps from G8eIdentifiableModel. The settings object contains nested groups consumed by g8ee typed models.

user_id.description: User identifier. Must match the {user_id} portion of the document ID.

llm._description: Maps to g8ee LLMSettings model. Keys use model field names and aliases.

llm_model.description: Primary LLM model name (alias for primary_model).

llm_assistant_model.description: Assistant LLM model name (alias for assistant_model).

eval_judge._description: Maps to g8ee EvalJudgeSettings model. Keys use alias names.
